title: Switch to public transit 3x/week
description: Replace car trips with bus, train, or metro three times a week.

title: Cycle to work
description: Replace your daily commute with cycling. Zero emissions and great for health.

title: Work from home 2 days/week
description: Cutting two commute days eliminates significant transport emissions.

title: Cancel one short-haul flight/year
description: Take the train instead. Short flights are particularly emission-intensive per km.

title: Switch to electric vehicle
description: EVs emit ~60-70% less CO₂ over their lifetime vs petrol cars.

title: Carpool to work
description: Share your commute with a colleague. Halves per-person emissions.

title: Combine errands into one trip
description: Plan shopping and errands efficiently to reduce total km driven.

title: Maintain proper tyre pressure
description: Under-inflated tyres increase fuel consumption by up to 3%.

title: Offset remaining flights with verified credits
description: Purchase Gold Standard or VCS certified carbon offsets for flights you can't avoid.

title: Use e-scooter/e-bike for short trips
description: Electric micromobility for trips under 5km cuts 95% of car emissions.

title: Have one vegan day per week
description: Meat-free Mondays can save over 200kg CO₂e per year.

title: Reduce red meat to 2x/week
description: Beef has 10x the carbon footprint of chicken and 50x that of legumes.

title: Cut food waste in half
description: ~30% of all food produced is wasted. Halving waste saves significant emissions.

title: Buy seasonal and local produce
description: Local, in-season food has up to 50% lower transport emissions.

title: Compost kitchen scraps
description: Composting diverts waste from landfill where it would produce methane.

title: Switch to plant-based milk
description: Oat or almond milk emits 3x less CO₂ than dairy milk.

title: Grow your own herbs & vegetables
description: A small garden or windowsill herbs = zero food miles.

title: Plan meals weekly to reduce impulse waste
description: Planned shopping reduces over-purchasing and food spoilage by ~25%.

title: Replace one beef meal with legumes per week
description: Lentils and beans emit 50x less CO₂ per gram of protein than beef.

title: Use a reusable water bottle & coffee cup
description: Eliminates plastic production emissions from single-use items.

title: Switch to 100% renewable energy tariff
description: Many suppliers offer green tariffs. This alone can cut home energy emissions by 80%.

title: Install LED lighting throughout home
description: LEDs use 75% less energy than incandescent bulbs and last 25x longer.

title: Lower thermostat by 1°C in winter
description: Each degree saves ~10% on heating bills and ~200kg CO₂e/year.

title: Install a smart thermostat
description: Smart thermostats learn your schedule and reduce heating waste by 10-15%.

title: Insulate loft and walls
description: Poor insulation accounts for 25% of heat loss. Insulation pays back in 3-5 years.

title: Wash clothes at 30°C
description: Modern detergents work well at low temps. Saves ~40% of washing energy.

title: Air-dry clothes instead of tumble drying
description: Tumble dryers are high energy. Line/rack drying saves ~150kg CO₂e/year.

title: Install solar panels
description: Residential solar can eliminate 1-2 tonnes of CO₂e per year.

title: Unplug devices on standby
description: Standby power accounts for 5-10% of household electricity use.

title: Use a pressure cooker or instant pot
description: Pressure cooking uses up to 70% less energy than conventional cooking.

title: Switch to induction hob from gas
description: Induction is 3x more efficient than gas hobs and eliminates indoor air pollution.

title: Buy second-hand clothing first
description: Fashion accounts for 10% of global emissions. Second-hand extends garment life.

title: Avoid fast fashion — buy less, buy better
description: Each €1000 less spent on fast fashion saves ~300kg CO₂e.

title: Repair electronics instead of replacing
description: Manufacturing a smartphone emits 70kg CO₂e. Repairing extends its life.

title: Stream at standard definition when possible
description: 4K streaming uses 3x more energy than HD. Switching saves ~15kg CO₂e/year.

title: Delete unused apps and cloud data
description: Data centres use significant energy. Clearing digital clutter reduces server load.

title: Switch to a green bank/pension fund
description: Banks invest deposits. Green banks avoid fossil fuel financing.

title: Use shampoo bars and solid toiletries
description: Eliminates plastic packaging and often requires less product per use.

title: Take shorter showers (< 5 min)
description: Hot water heating accounts for ~15% of home energy. Short showers help.

title: Plant trees or support reforestation
description: Each tree absorbs ~25kg CO₂ per year when mature. Plant locally.

title: Switch to a zero-waste grocery store
description: Packaging production is a hidden emission source. Bulk buying with containers helps.

title: Choose experiences over things as gifts
description: Experiences (concerts, classes) create memories with far lower carbon footprints.

title: Advocate and vote for climate policies
description: Systemic change driven by political engagement has outsized impact.
